Scenario.overview: Communications Simple Briefly, the attackers targeted Ukrainian electric power companies with spear phishing attacks, utilizing PowerShell to execute malicious scripts, and disrupting communication services by flooding network resources.
Scenario.attack_surface: AVAILABLE_SURFACES: Internet-facing assets Hacking Tools Network Traffic File
Scenario.attack_vector: AVAILABLE_VECTORS: General Access Method PowerShell Script Network Traffic Content (Mechanism) File Modification (Mechanism)

stage.name: Initial Access
stage.description: The attackers sent targeted emails containing malicious links or attachments to employees.

stage.name: Execution
stage.capec: CAPEC-108: Command Line Execution through SQL Injection
stage.description: The attackers utilized PowerShell to execute malicious scripts.

stage.name: Impact
stage.description: The attackers disrupted communication services by flooding network resources.

stage.name: Impact
stage.capec: CAPEC-675: Retrieve Data from Decommissioned Devices
stage.description: The attackers deleted or corrupted critical data related to communications.

Scenario.summary: The attackers employed a simple yet effective strategy targeting Ukrainian electric power companies with spear phishing attacks, leveraging PowerShell to execute malicious scripts, and disrupting communication services by flooding network resources.
